<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Sunflower Burst](05-sunflower-burst.jpg)

Hard to be miserable in a room with sunflowers in it. We mix tall classic yellows with the smaller ProCut series and a few branches of viburnum berries when we have them, for the contrast.

## What's in it

- 6–8 sunflower stems, mix of varieties
- Viburnum berries when in season
- Pittosporum greens

## Care

Sunflowers are thirsty — change water every day and check the level often.
